text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Hey, since you're so tall, do you ever
hit your head on the ceiling and stuff?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Of course not!♪ If I got too close to
the ceiling, I'd feel it with my ears first.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! That's just like Carrot Ranger
and her leaves!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, Carrot Ranger has leaves
growing from her head, right?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Those leaves are actually
ultrasensitive sensors, you know!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
When she puts her leaves up against
the ceiling, she can search the floor
above by picking up the vibrations!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Aw, I wish I could try that!
Maybe I can after my growth spurt!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I have an idea!☆ Why don't I hold you up
so your ears reach the ceiling?
